violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item * was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Spray bottle was not labeled with contents. Generic bottles are used for both food and cleaning that are not properly labeled.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. - No dates of RTE foods in the walk-in

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Clean in place equipment was not cleaned adequately. Cook top, fryers, freezer next to fryer.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer in the sani-bucket was 0ppm Sanitizer in the dishwasher was <50ppm
Toilet facilities. — --* Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. - Bathroom doors are not self closing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls dirty

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Food prep, handwash sinks and/or warewash equipment * was used for cleaning or holding of maintenance items. - Hand sink had a pair of crocs sitting in the sink. Hand sink had not been used for the day eventhough there was cooking taking place.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
